en: In his body and in mine, he's a well-respected man of our town, doing the best things so concerningly.
When I see them all running like that, with their things bouncing around in their shorts,
ja: 短パンの中で物が揺れてて、
zhTW: 東西在短褲裡晃來晃去，
vi: mọi thứ nảy lên trong quần short,

en: I always picture them naked, even if I don't want to. All I see is pork swords.
ko: 원치 않더라도 항상 그들이 나체인 모습이 떠올라.
ja: 望んでなくても裸を想像しちゃうんだ。
zhTW: 我總是會想像他們沒穿衣服，即使我不想。
vi: tôi luôn tưởng tượng họ không mặc gì, dù không muốn.

en: I'm supposed to be running. So guess what?
ja: 走らなきゃいけないのに。
vi: Tôi phải đi chạy mới đúng.

en: What? I don't know. I'm pregnant.
